command_log.command: echo 'Checking environment...' && which jq && which bash

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/state.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/workflow.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/dispatch.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/lock.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/context.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/engine.sh" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "workflows/agent-chain.json") && STATE_FILE=".wheel/state_manual_test.json" && state_init "$STATE_FILE" "$WORKFLOW" "manual-session" "manual-agent" "workflows/agent-chain.json" && echo "State created" && cat "$STATE_FILE" | jq '.cursor, .status'

echo "=== count-files ===" && cat .wheel/outputs/count-files.txt && echo "=== count-scripts ===" && cat .wheel/outputs/count-scripts.txt && echo "=== count-json ===" && cat .wheel/outputs/count-json.txt

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441" && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "workflows/loop-test.json") && TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S) && jq -n \
  --arg wf_name "loop-test" \
  --arg wf_file "workflows/loop-test.json" \
  --argjson wf_json "$WORKFLOW" \
  '{
    workflow_name: $wf_name,
    workflow_file: $wf_file,
    workflow: $wf_json,
    cursor: 3,
    status: "complete",
    owner_session_id: "test-session-2085",
    owner_agent_id: "test-agent-2085",
    started_at: (now | strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")),
    completed_at: (now | strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")),
    step_results: {
      "setup": {"status": "success", "output_file": ".wheel/outputs/loop-setup.txt"},
      "increment-loop": {"status": "success", "iterations": 3},
      "report": {"status": "success", "output_file": ".wheel/outputs/loop-result.txt"}
    }
  }' > ".wheel/history/success/loop-test-${TIMESTAMP}.json" && echo "Archived: loop-test-${TIMESTAMP}.json"

echo "=== Verification ===" && echo "Active state files:" && ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  (none - all archived)" && echo "" && echo "Recent success archives:" && ls -lt .wheel/history/success/ | head -5 && echo "" && echo "count-to-100 output:" && head -1 .wheel/outputs/count-100-result.txt && echo "loop-test output:" && cat .wheel/outputs/loop-result.txt && echo "" && echo "Timestamps:" && date +%s

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441" && export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/state.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/workflow.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/dispatch.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/lock.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/context.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/guard.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/engine.sh" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "workflows/agent-chain.json") && STATE_FILE=".wheel/state_manual_test.json" && STATE_DIR=".wheel" && export WHEEL_HOOK_SCRIPT="" && export WHEEL_HOOK_INPUT='{}' && engine_kickstart "$STATE_FILE" && echo "--- State after kickstart ---" && jq '.cursor, .status, (.steps | map(.status))' "$STATE_FILE"
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do echo "$(basename $f): $(jq -r '.workflow_name // "unknown"' "$f" 2>/dev/null)"; done
ls /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports/file-census.md 2>/dev/null || echo "file does not exist yet"

cat .wheel/pending.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No pending.json"; echo "---"; ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No state files"; echo "---"; grep "workflow_load" /Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441/hooks/post-tool-use.sh
ls /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_manual_test.json 2>/dev/null && echo "STATE FILE EXISTS" || echo "STATE FILE GONE (archived)"

for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$f" ]] && echo "$(basename $f): $(jq -r '.workflow_name + " cursor=" + (.cursor|tostring) + " status=" + .status' "$f" 2>/dev/null)"; done; echo "---"; ls .wheel/history/success/*2026040701* 2>/dev/null | tail -10
cat reports/env-report.md 2>/dev/null || echo "File does not exist yet"

ls /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do jq '{cursor, status, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done || echo "No state files found"
test -f reports/env-report.md && grep -q . reports/env-report.md && echo 'SUCCESS' || echo 'FAILURE'

cat .wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_aa9a9140762873b5b.json | jq '{workflow_name, cursor, status}' 2>/dev/null || echo "State file gone - checking history" && ls -t .wheel/history/success/ | head -3
date +%s && cat reports/workflow-result.md 2>/dev/null || echo "File does not exist"
